parents.subject: LU-12410 lnet: Add additional output to sanity-lnet.sh

commit.subject: LU-11170 test: Skip sanity/415 for ZFS 0.8.0+
commit.message:
LU-11170 test: Skip sanity/415 for ZFS 0.8.0+

Add ZFS_VERSION based on mds1 zfs version if present
Because of very slow results (500-700 renames/s) skip this test for
now.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Nathaniel Clark <nclark@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I865dd2d737e81b20b2d2a899dc9fed536af77517
